surfaces.card: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-sm shadow-none transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md hover:border-gray-300
surfaces.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-200 backdrop-saturate-150
surfaces.input: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black focus:border-black transition-all

button.primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-gray-800 rounded-sm font-medium transition-colors
button.secondary: bg-gray-100 text-black hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-sm font-medium transition-colors
button.outline: bg-transparent border border-gray-200 text-black hover:border-black rounded-sm font-medium transition-colors

components.strategy: Shadcn UI heavy with brutalist/minimalist overrides. Sharp corners (rounded-sm or rounded-none). Flat backgrounds, 1px solid borders. No soft shadows unless hovering.

customizations.tabs: Override Shadcn fixed height. Use h-auto. Minimalist bottom-border style preferred over pill style.
customizations.dialog: Minimal padding, sharp corners, backdrop-blur-sm on overlay.
customizations.badge: Flat colors matching status, uppercase, font-ibm-plex-mono text-xs tracking-widest px-2 py-1 rounded-sm.

third_party.charts: recharts (for revision streaks and category progress)
third_party.markdown: react-markdown + remark-gfm (for code snippets in answers)

images.description: Minimal geometric abstract image for empty states (no questions found, zero mistakes, etc.)

media.rules: Use the empty state image with extreme desaturation (grayscale) and low opacity (20%) as a background watermark for empty sections.

testing.rules: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, dialog triggers) MUST have a role-based data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='add-question-btn', data-testid='filter-status-select').

features: Category-wise Question Management (JS, React, Redux, DSA, Debugging, Prod Issues)
CRUD operations for Questions (Question + Ideal Answer)
Status tracking (Not Started, In Progress, Revised, Strong)
Smart Revision System (Scoring = mistakes count + time since last revision + status weight)
architecture_plan.state_management: Zustand store with persist middleware for LocalStorage (can swap to MongoDB later).
architecture_plan.routing: React Router (Dashboard Home, Categories View, Smart Revision Mode, Settings)

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the Swiss & High-Contrast light theme. Do not use gradients.
Ensure headings use Chivo and body uses IBM Plex Sans. Import these from Google Fonts.
Use JetBrains Mono or IBM Plex Mono for all code snippets, tags, and badges.
Build a 'Smart Revision' view that sorts questions based on the custom scoring algorithm (Mistakes > Time > Status).
Use Shadcn UI extensively but override rounded corners to 'rounded-sm' (2px or 4px) to fit the technical/brutalist developer vibe.
For the empty state, use the provided Unsplash image, styled as a desaturated background watermark.
Implement Markdown support for the 'Final Ideal Answer' so developers can format code blocks.
